div.p: The official URL for this implementation guide is:
Dieser IG beschreibt Datenmodelle und Anwendungsfälle für den grenzüberschreitenden Datenaustausch der TIFlow Anwendungden mit dem NCPeH Deutschland

name.value: gematik GmbH

description.value: Dieser IG beschreibt Datenmodelle und Anwendungsfälle für den grenzüberschreitenden Datenaustausch der TIFlow Anwendungden mit dem NCPeH Deutschland

valueMarkdown.value: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology
Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on the HL7 Extension Pack

name.value: CodeSystem of NCPeH Request Types

description.value: Type of Request from NCPeH

name.value: CodeSystem of types for a consent

description.value: Type of patient consent.

name.value: Consent for ePrescriptions

description.value: Records the consent of the patient for an operation in the context of ePrescription.

name.value: Dispensation of the Prescription from the EU

description.value: Handles information about the redeem of the prescription and the submited medication from the EU.

name.value: Dispense Data from EU

description.value: Logical Information that is Provided in the dispensation document by the NCPeH of country B for Dispensing Medication

name.value: ERPEU CapabilityStatement fuer den E-Rezept-Fachdienst

description.value: CapabilityStatement fuer den E-Rezept-Fachdienst (EU-Zugriff)
Medication of a Prescription or Dispensation from the EU

The operation $close finishes the e-prescription workflow and creates a receipt. The Output of this operation is a signed Bundle, to be used for further financial processing. The status of the Task then changes into #completed

name.value: Example error response for ERP-EU operations

description.value: Representative validation error for EU access operation input

name.value: Example EU-Close Parameters
Example EU-GET Prescription Parameters
Example EU-GET Prescription Parameters
Example EU-GET Prescription Parameters
Example for a Bundle with a Consent
Example for a Consent to redeem EU Prescritptions
Example Medication Dispense

description.value: Example of a Medication Dispense.
Example of an EU Organization
Example of an EU Practitioner
Example of an EU PractitionerRole

name.value: GEM ERP PR EU CloseOperation Input

description.value: This profile defines the parameters for receiving dispense information for a prescription that was redeemed in the EU

name.value: GEM ERPEU PR PAR Access Authorization Request

description.value: Displays Parameters for EU Access Authorization

name.value: GEM ERPEU PR PAR Access Authorization Response

description.value: Displays Response Parameters for EU Access Authorization

name.value: GEM ERPEU PR PAR GET Prescription Input

description.value: This profile defines the parameters for receiving dispense information for a prescription that was redeemed in the EU

name.value: GEM ERPEU PR PAR GET Prescription Output

description.value: This profile defines the output parameters for the Get Prescription Operation

name.value: GEM ERPEU PR PAR PATCH Task Input

description.value: This profile defines the parameters for patching the Task to mark the prescription as to-be-redeemed in the EU
Description of a packaged medicinal product.
Identifier of a packaged medicinal product refers to a specific pack size of a specific product.
The Operation gets Presciption Information from the ERP System for usage in the e-prescription workflow for EU countries
This operation receives the access code and the country that the patient wants to grant access to. The operation validates the country and creates registeres the Access Code.

name.value: Identifier Profile for EU AccessCode

description.value: The AccessCode that is generated by the FdV in order to access the ePrescription in an EU country.

name.value: Medication Without code or system for Strength
Medication Without code or system for Strength
Organization Information Received from the EU

description.value: This Organization Profile is sent by the NCPeH when redeeming a Prescription in the EU

name.value: Practitioner Information Received from the EU

description.value: This Practitioner Profile is sent by the NCPeH when redeeming a Prescription in the EU

name.value: PractitionerRole Information Received from the EU

description.value: This PractitionerRole Profile is sent by the NCPeH when redeeming a Prescription in the EU
This operation reads the currenty in the E-Rezept-Fachdienst registered Access Code for redeeming ePrescriptions in an EU country.
This operation revokes the currently registered access code for redeeming prescriptions in an EU country.

name.value: Sample Medication Sumatripan
Sample Simple Medication
TIFLOW XBORDER Operation Outcome Details CS

description.value: Fehlercodes für cross-border Szenarien, die im Rahmen des TIFlow in den OperationOutcomes.details angegeben werden können

name.value: TIFLOW XBORDER Operation Outcome Details VS

description.value: Fehlercodes für cross-border Szenarien, die im Rahmen des TIFlow in den OperationOutcomes.details angegeben werden können

name.value: ValueSet of Consent Codes

description.value: Type of Consents for the ePrescription.

name.value: ValueSet of Consent PolyRule Codes

description.value: Type of Policy Rules for Consents of the ePrescription.

name.value: ValueSet of NCPeH Request Types

description.value: Type of Request from NCPeH

title.value: Einlösen von E-Rezepten im europäischen Ausland
Operation API: E-Rezepte zur Einlösung im EU-Ausland abrufen
FD-Anforderungen: E-Rezepte zur Einlösung im EU-Ausland abrufen
NCPeH-Anforderungen: E-Rezepte zur Einlösung im EU-Ausland abrufen
Operation API: Abgabe von E-Rezepten im EU-Ausland
FD-Anforderungen: Abgabe von E-Rezepten im EU-Ausland
NCPeH-Anforderungen: Abgabe von E-Rezepten im EU-Ausland
